# Lauls Private Limited

> Steel distribution, logistics, and railway manufacturing company based in Faridabad, India since 1933.

## Core Services

- **Steel Distribution**: Wire rods, steel rounds, precision tubes, ferro alloys
- **Logistics**: Full truckload, part load, express delivery, EV fleet
- **Railway Manufacturing**: RDSO approved track fasteners, fishplates, elastic rail clips
- **Distribution**: Pan-India network with 50+ warehouses

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://lauls.in) - Company overview and services
- [About](https://lauls.in/about) - History, leadership, and values
- [Products](https://lauls.in/products) - Steel product catalog
- [Logistics](https://lauls.in/logistics) - Transportation and warehousing
- [Distribution](https://lauls.in/distribution) - Pan-India distribution network
- [Electric Trucks](https://lauls.in/electric-truck) - EV fleet operations
- [CSR](https://lauls.in/csr) - Corporate social responsibility
- [Contact](https://lauls.in/contact) - Contact information
- [Blog](https://lauls.in/blog) - Industry insights and news
